## Diagram 1

```mermaid
graph TD
  Start([Incoming event]) --> ExtractBody[/"body = event.get('body') or {}"/]
  ExtractBody --> Sanitize{{"fv.aws.lambdas.sanitize(event)"}}
  Sanitize --> BuildReceipt[/"build_receipt_log(log_event, body)"/]
  BuildReceipt --> Publish["sns_client.publish(TopicArn=topic_arn, Message=json.dumps(receipt_log))"]
  Publish --> Success([Publish succeeded])
  Publish -- ClientError --> HandleError[/"except ClientError as e"/]
  HandleError --> CheckMsg{"e.response.Error.Message == 'Invalid parameter: Message too long' ?"}
  CheckMsg -- Yes --> LogException["logger.exception(...payload too large...)"]
  CheckMsg -- No --> Reraise["raise e"]
  LogException --> End([End])
  Reraise --> End
  Success --> End
```

## Diagram 2

```mermaid
classDiagram
  class Module {
    +logger: Logger
    +aws_stage: Stage
    +topic_name: str
    +topic_arn: str
    +sns_client
    +configure_rollbar()
  }
  class fv_aws_lambdas {
    +sanitize(event)
    +get_topic_arn(name)
    +get_header(event, header_name)
    +get_request_id(event)
    +get_lambda_level(event)
    +LAMBDA_ID_HEADER_NAME
    +PARENT_LAMBDA_ID_HEADER_NAME
    +constants
  }
  class fv_encoding_json {
    +encoder
  }
  class fv_datadog {
    +wrap_lambda_handler(func)
  }
  class fv_log {
    +config_logging(func)
  }
  class rollbar_mod {
    +lambda_function(func)
  }
  class aws_boto3 {
    +client(service_name)
  }
  Module --|> fv_aws_lambdas : uses
  Module --|> fv_encoding_json : uses
  Module --|> fv_datadog : uses
  Module --|> fv_log : uses
  Module --|> rollbar_mod : uses
  Module --|> aws_boto3 : uses
  fv_aws_lambdas .. constants : contains
  fv_encoding_json .. encoder : exposes
  fv_datadog .. wrap_lambda_handler : decorator
  fv_log .. config_logging : decorator
  rollbar_mod .. lambda_function : decorator
```
